commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=92cc60176d03e341e7f039035c58499e2f3108dc)
commands.review_summary:
This PR documents the existing bootstrap truncation-warning default, adds a prompt-cache system-prompt digest-drift diagnostic helper and warn call, extends docs/config help, and adds prompt-cache observability tests.

PR surface: Source +56, Tests +99, Docs +16. Total +171 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: `once` mode can remove the warning block after turn 1, and the PR body includes live cache-trace/log output showing system-prompt digest drift and a cacheRead drop. I did not rerun the live gateway scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automation-safe repair can qualify the docs/config help to match the existing runtime gate; changing the warning level or moving it to the normal path should remain a maintainer decision.
